name_en: Exclusive Launch Model: M47125 Authentic Version (Dynamic Code) (Quality Upgrade, Synchronized with Boutiques, Dynamic Electronic Chip, Gift Bag, Protection Paper, Copper Plate Electronic Tag, Certificate of Authenticity) Leather is from a genuine factory in Italy, Grade A leather (Top-tier Authentic): The so-called top-tier authenticity lies in quality, hardware, fabric, craftsmanship, edge painting, Grade A output, product photos match the actual product, and comes with the full packaging shown in the photos. Dimensions: 19x11.5x6.5CM🌟Serial Number: 168880
